title: The UK’s generational tobacco ban might not work. I’m supporting it anyway.

title: What AI Earbuds Can’t Replace: The Value of Learning Another Language
summary: Your host in Osaka, Japan, slips on a pair of headphones and suddenly hears your words transformed into flawless Kansai Japanese. Even better, their reply in their native tongue comes through perfectly clear to you. Thanks to artificial intelligence, neither of you is lost in translation.
